title: agrostis australiensis
intro: Agrostis australiensis, also known as the Tasmanian bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis australiensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. Herbal preparations of Agrostis australiensis are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
